name: Shizuko Kaga
description:
**Height:** 158 cm 

One of Misaki and Sakura’s friends, a sensible and intelligent girl who often spends lunchtime with them. Shizuko is a member of the flower arranging club and is good at math, but isn’t very good at physical activities. She has an older brother in university and a younger sister in junior high school; according to Sakura, the three of them look very alike.

(Source: Wikipedia)
